name: n8n Sync Receiver Product Inventory with Odoo

how to update / reason for deprecation: deactivate — availability is served by the receiver_product_inventory view (laravel_live view over co-hosted serp_stock_quant × serp_product_product), so the odoo_inventory feed (and this workflow) is no longer needed

name: odoo_inventory table

how to update / reason for deprecation: deprecated — all reads move to the receiver_product_inventory view (served from the source serp_* tables); drop the table in the post-cutover Laravel cleanup
